title: Phylogenetic Tree-Based Microbiome Association Statistical Modeling for Clinical Survival Data
koreanTitle: 임상 생존자료 분석을 위한 계통수 기반 미생물 연관성 통계모형 개발
description: This three-year nationally funded research grant supports the development of statistical methods for microbiome association analysis in clinical survival data, with a focus on phylogenetic tree-based modeling and biomedical applications.

title: A Study on the Need for Certification Criteria for 37 Types of Smart Safety Equipment Supported by Public Funding
koreanTitle: 스마트 안전장비 공단 재정지원 대상 37종 인증기준 도입 필요성에 관한 연구
fundingAgency: Occupational Safety and Health Research Institute / Korea Occupational Safety and Health Agency
description: This commissioned research project evaluates the need for certification criteria for publicly supported smart safety equipment. The K² Lab contributes to survey design, sampling strategy, statistical analysis, and quantitative evaluation of stakeholder perceptions and policy feasibility.
